mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a recovery code.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address tied to your Qeet ID account and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successText: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a one-time reset link. The link expires in 60 minutes.
forgotPassword.successResend: Didn't get it? Check spam, or

magic.missingText: This link doesn't carry a sign-in token. If you got here via a recently-sent email, try copying the URL directly from the message body.
magic.expiredText: This link was either already used or has expired. Magic links work once and last 60 minutes.

invite.invalidDescription: This link is missing its token. Ask your workspace admin to resend the invite.
invite.acceptDescription: Set a password to finish joining the workspace — you'll be signed in afterwards.
invite.displayNamePlaceholder: How you'd like to be addressed

sso.noCodeText: This page completes a SAML single sign-on. Start the flow from your identity provider, or sign in directly.
sso.errorTrailer: The code is single-use and short-lived — start the SSO flow again from your identity provider.
